title: Ultimate SetHome
description: A professional sethome system with a custom  GUI, movement detection, and multiple countdown modes (BossBar, Title, Chat).
body:
________________________________________________________________________________________________
A professional, high-performance teleportation system for your Minecraft server.

Ultimate Sethome is designed to provide players with a seamless way to manage their home locations through a beautiful, intuitive Graphical User Interface (GUI). With built-in anti-cheat measures and customizable countdowns, it's the perfect addition to any Survival, Skyblock, or SMP server.
________________________________________________________________________________________________
## ✨ Key Features
**📦 Advanced GUI Menu:** Manage all your homes in a 54-slot chest interface with custom glass borders (Ender/Void Style).

**🛡️ Anti-Steal Protection:** Hardened GUI logic prevents players from taking items out of the menu – 100% secure.

**⏳ Flexible Countdown Modes:** Choose how players see their teleport timer:

**TITLE:** Big, bold text in the center of the screen.

**BOSSBAR:** A sleek progress bar at the top of the screen.

**CHAT:** Classic, clean messages in the chat box.

**🚫 Movement Detection:** Teleportation cancels instantly if the player moves, preventing easy escapes from combat.

**💎 Rank-Based Limits:** Set different home limits for different players (e.g., Default: 3, VIP: 10, Admin: 999).

**🎨 Fully Customizable:** Everything from messages, sounds, and particle types to the HEX colors in the console banner can be changed in config.yml.
________________________________________________________________________________________________

| Command             | Description           | Permission           |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| /sethome <name>            |Create a new home              |ultimatesethome.use             |
| /home            | Open the Home Manager              |ultimatesethome.use             |
| /adminhome reload            | Refresh the config              | ultimatesethome.admin             |

________________________________________________________________________________________________

## 🛠️ Installation:
1.Download Ultimate sethome

2.Drop it into your plugins folder.

3.Restart your server.

4.Configure everything in config.yml

Created by **GraSter1234**
